contracts.name: Reentrancy Vulnerable
contracts.label: vulnerable
what_to_check: Order of call vs balance update
attack_steps: Re-enter from receive() before balance update

contracts.name: Access Control Missing
contracts.label: vulnerable
what_to_check: No onlyOwner or role check on critical functions

contracts.name: Pull Payment Safe
contracts.label: safe
what_to_check: Payees withdraw; no push to untrusted

contracts.name: ERC20 Unsafe Approval
contracts.label: vulnerable
contracts.impact: Approve front-run or infinite approval abuse

contracts.name: Safe Math 0.8
contracts.label: safe
what_to_check: No unchecked blocks for user input

contracts.name: Unchecked Block
contracts.label: vulnerable
contracts.impact: Overflow when used on untrusted input

contracts.name: Revert Griefing
contracts.label: vulnerable
contracts.impact: One user can block batch operations
key_patterns: batch loop reverts on first failure

contracts.name: Timestamp Manipulation
contracts.label: vulnerable
key_patterns: block.timestamp for randomness or critical logic

contracts.name: Vault Inflation Attack
contracts.label: vulnerable
attack_steps: Donate large amount directly to vault
Share price inflates; next depositor loses to rounding
